0752h: Just to comment that from 3 to 10 July, 3 days (3,7,9 July) mentioned a high river, strong current and absence of tides. On other days within this period (3 to 10 July), the log did not mention tides at all, so one might presume they continued to be absent and the river continued to be high. (Except for 5 July when it was briefly mentioned, !tide ebbing!).   Today, 11 July, conditions finally went back to normal (0735h low slack water, 0752h tide turned to flood) and remained so for the remainder of July.
